sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94742" key="skeuo/triy" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκευότριψ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῐβος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">τρίβω</etym>) <sense id="n94742.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who breaks vessels</tr_>, Hdn.Gr.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.246</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
